name: search_articles
description: Search the Zendesk Help Center knowledge base for articles matching a query. Returns article titles, snippets, URLs, and section information. Useful for finding self-service answers before creating tickets.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query to match against article titles and bodies.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter results to a specific Help Center category ID.

results.title: How to Reset Your Password
results.snippet: To reset your password, click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page...
